verses.text: Topa in na hong sep hun hong tung ding hi. Jerusalem khuapi kiluh gawpin, note' muh mahmahin a na lakte uh hawm ding uh hi

Jerusalem khuapi a sim dingin Topa in minam khempeuh kaikhawm ding hi. A khuapi kila-in, a innte kiluh gawpin, a numeite zong kibuan gawp ding hi. Mi alang bang salin kipaikhiatpih ding a, adangte ahih leh kipaikhiatpih lo ding hi
Tua ciangin Topa hong kuankhia ding a, a beisa hunah a sim ngei bangin hih minam dangte hong sim ding hi

Tua ciangin Jerusalem nisuahna lamah a om Oliv Mual tungah Topa a ding ding hi. Tua ciangin nisuahna lam pan nitumna lamah Oliv Mual kitamin phel nih suak ding a, a kikalah kuampi om ding hi. A mual kimkhat leilu lamah kikhinin, kimkhat leitaw lamah kikhin ding hi
Hinnom kuam sung kivukcip ding a, Judah kumpi Uzzah' hun lai-in zinlin'na-a a kivukcip mah bang ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka Pasian hong pai ding a, a mi siangthote khempeuh hong tonpih ding hi
Tua ni hong tun' ciangin khuadam, vukkiat cihte om nawnlo ding a
khuamial hun cih zong omlo ding hi. Zan hun nangawnin sun khuavak bek om ding hi. Hih thu a pian' ding hun, Topa bek in a thei hi

Tua ni hong tun' ciangin Jerusalem khua panin tuicim hong luangkhia ding a, kimkhat, nisuahna lamah a om Si Tuipi-ah luang ding a, kimkhat, nitumna lamah a om Mediterranean Tuipi-ah luang ding hi. Tua tui in kan' hun cih neiloin luang tawntung ding hi
Tua ciangin Topa pen leitung khempeuh' kumpi suak ding a, mi khempeuh in amah bek thei-in bia ding uh hi

Leilu lam Geba khua panin leitaw lam Rimmon khua dong, leitung khempeuh, zanglei suak ding hi. Ahi zongin Jerusalem khuapi pen bangmah ciloin a sangpi-in om ding a, Benjamin Kongpi pana kipan nidanga kongpi a omnasa Kiu Kongpi dong, leh Hananel Tausang panin kumpipa' leenggah cilna phual ciangdong a ban ding hi
Tua khuapi sungah lungmuang takin mi teng ding uh a, lauhuaina tuakkha nawnlo ding uh hi

Tua ciangin Jerusalem khuapi a sim minam dang khempeuhte tungah Topa in gimna lianpi tungsak ding hi. A khe-un a ding thei kimlai mahin a sa uh muatmang ding a, a mitkua sung uhah a mittangte uh muatin, a kam sung uhah a leiite uh muat ding hi
Tua ni ciangin Topa in amaute amkhamsak gawp ding a, mite in a gei-a a matkhak mite manin khatlekhat kilaithang gawp ding uh hi
Judah mite in Jerusalem khuapi hutna-in galte do ding uh a, minam dang khempeuhte' neihsa kham, ngun, leh puante tampi tak a laksak ding uh hi
Galte' phuala om sakolte, lasakolte, kalaohte, late, leh ganhing om khempeuh tungah gimna lianpi a tung ding hi

Tua bangin galte a kizawhgawp khit ciangin, galte sung panin a nungtalai mite in Vanglian Topa, kumpi ahihna hangin a bia ding leh ama gualzawhna pawi a bawl dingin kumsimin Jerusalem-ah pai tawntung ding uh hi
Minam khat peuhpeuh, Vanglian Topa ahi kumpipa a bia dingin Jerusalem-ah a painop kei leh amau' gamsungah guah zulo ding hi
Tua gualzawhna pawi a bawl dingin Egypt mite a painop kei leh, tua bangin a pai nuamlo minamte' thuak ding gimnate mah, amau' tungah a tung ding hi
Gualzawhna pawi a bawl dingin a pai nuamlo Egypt mite leh minam dang khempeuhte tungah a tung ding gimna pen tu-a bang ahi hi

Tua ni ciangin sakol khilongte khempeuh tungah, “ Topa-a' dingin A Kipia,” ci-in ciamtehna kibawl ding hi. Biakinn sunga a om beelte khempeuh pen biakna tau mai-ah a kikoih kuangte mah bangin a siangtho-in kinei ding hi

Jerusalem khuasung leh Judah gamsungah a om beelte khempeuh, Vanglian Topa biakna-in zat dingin a tuamin kikoih ding hi. Biakna a pia dingin a hong pai mi khempeuh in tua beelte zangin, biakna sa huanna-in a nei ding uh hi. Tua ni hong tun' ciangin Vanglian Topa' biakinn-ah sumzuak vanzuak cihte om nawnlo ding hi.
